use_cases: Collecting product ratings in e-commerce checkout flows
Gathering customer satisfaction scores in feedback forms
Adding star-based review systems to SaaS dashboards
Enabling half-star ratings for nuanced product evaluations
Displaying interactive rating selectors in media review sites
ai_summary: A customizable star rating group component built on Ark UI that supports full and half-star ratings with interactive hover effects and keyboard navigation. Features accessible focus states with ring indicators and displays contextual rating labels. Perfect for e-commerce product reviews, customer satisfaction surveys, and SaaS applications needing interactive rating inputs.
